overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair walking through Night City at dusk. The character crosses a futuristic intersection and proceeds along a covered pedestrian walkway lined with neon digital billboards and towering glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character begins walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: third-person character with blue hair and green jacket crossing the wide intersection alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white patterned shirt walking parallel to the character
futuristic blue car waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: towering futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes marked on the asphalt
tall pole with red traffic lights and decorative red banners hanging
large illuminated advertisement showing a perfume bottle and two figures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection during dusk, with the character standing at a yellow-striped crosswalk. Towering glass skyscrapers rise in the background while the character begins crossing the street alongside sparse pedestrian traffic. A futuristic vehicle waits at the red light on the right as the camera follows the character's movement across the wide asphalt crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with large advertising billboard and approaching covered walkway

events.description: character turns right off the crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk
character passes the large FERVID billboard and approaches the covered walkway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past other pedestrians while approaching the large illuminated billboard and covered walkway structure

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket and hat walking toward the camera
futuristic sports car driving along the street

entered.detail: grey concrete pedestrian pavement with red painted curb
stylized trees with rounded canopies planted along the street edge
elevated covered pedestrian walkway with curved roof and integrated lighting
thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway and walkway structures

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the crosswalk onto a concrete sidewalk, walking past the large illuminated FERVID perfume billboard that dominates the left side of the frame. The environment features sparse pedestrian traffic moving in opposing directions, decorative trees lining the street, and futuristic vehicles passing by. The covered walkway structure becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches the entrance to the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon digital advertising displays

events.description: character enters the covered pedestrian walkway with overhead structure
ambient lighting shifts to darker tones with prominent neon and digital screen illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway under the curved roof structure, passing other pedestrians and digital displays

notable_agents.action: woman in blue top and jeans walking toward the camera

entered.detail: multiple large digital screens displaying colorful advertisements and animations
red and grey paved tiles forming the pedestrian path under the covered structure
massive concrete highway overpass with vehicles traveling above

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway with a distinctive curved roof structure overhead. The environment transitions from natural dusk light to artificial neon illumination from multiple digital billboards lining both sides of the path. The paved walkway is moderately populated with pedestrians walking in opposing directions, while massive support pillars and an elevated highway ramp become prominent features of the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense covered urban corridor with continuous digital advertising

events.description: passing urban benches and entering denser section of the covered walkway with more concentrated neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing through the neon-lit covered corridor, moving deeper into the dense urban environment with fewer pedestrians

entered.detail: metal and concrete benches for pedestrians along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered pedestrian walkway as the environment becomes denser with neon lighting and digital displays. The overhead structure dominates the upper frame while the path is lined with urban benches and continuous digital billboards. The crowd thins out as the character moves deeper into the corridor, surrounded by the glow of advertisements and the massive architectural elements of the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open city intersection at dusk into a densely illuminated, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins with the character crossing a wide, yellow-striped street amidst towering glass skyscrapers and waiting futuristic vehicles. As the character reaches the concrete sidewalk, the scene shifts past a massive, glowing perfume billboard and decorative trees before approaching the entrance of a covered walkway. The environment then transitions from the natural fading light of dusk to artificial neon illumination as the camera enters the curved roof structure, passing under an elevated highway ramp and massive support pillars. Finally, the path narrows into a corridor of continuous digital displays and urban benches, where the character moves deeper into the glow of the futuristic cityscape.
